mapper.insert: INSERT INTO court (name, address, price, images, open_time, status, type) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{price}, #{images}, #{openTime}, #{status}, #{type})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM court WHERE name LIKE '%${keyword}%' OR address LIKE '%${keyword}%'
mapper.update: UPDATE court SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, price = #{price}, images = #{images}, open_time = #{openTime}, status = #{status}, type = #{type} WHERE id = #{id}
